# model

**Instance Property**

The name of the rental car model.

## Declaration

```swift
var model: String? { get }
```

## Getting the Rental Car Information

- **rentalCompanyName**: The name of the rental car company.
- **type**: The type of rental car the user reserved.
- **make**: The name of the company that made the rental car.
- **rentalCarDescription**: A description of the rental car.
